name: BMW F10/F11 5 Series (4.4L V8 twin-turbo petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: 550i N63 twin-turbo V8: CBS oil service MFR 15,000 km / 12 months EU maximum (SIB B000214 / service display); many owners use 10,000 km oil (REC).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; garage.wiki F10/F18 lists first change at 3 years for many variants — follow manual.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 30,000 km: two air filters each second engine oil service (2 × 15,000 km) per garage.wiki F10/F18 second-oil rule and E60 550i pattern.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km: eight plugs each third engine oil service (3 × 15,000 km) per E60 V8 CBS pattern / BMW N63 maintenance data.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Hot-vee related cooling circuits; preventive ~100,000 km.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection V8: carbon service ~120,000 km if needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 15,000 km / 12 months EU maximum (large turbo V8). https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — brake fluid table; BMW owner's manual F10 550i
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 30,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/5-series-sedan/sixth-generation-f10-f18/2012/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change (2 × 15,000 km V8 ceiling)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km — third oil × 15,000 km ceiling; BMW TIS / parallel E60 550i N62 CBS plug row
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 40,000 km planning interval (F10 550i)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval (F10 550i)
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
